{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323151006F8E5511696B49C22B3E7"}"},"total":727},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607500846281229118","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"优点：情感细腻，剧情流畅自然，时间发展跨度舒服合理，没有别的文娱大段的注水情节，看下来又舒服又不舍，真的是仙草。
缺点：太少了，我个人感觉前期的天仙妈妈对男主的态度太讨厌了（其实我是代入上帝视角，所以为男主不值）
总结：非常非常非常非常支持阅读，一希望作者大大成绩能够越来越好，码字速度越来越快。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771261393,"group_id":"7590182452971179032","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4IrLkRZ8F+KVvtuOMkrAZrBv7DJN9UY12N2ez176bnr","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c897974b2db142179a705759108b42b1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795036&x-signature=XWbatGl%2B7zCdGZPtbj2AFpFF%2Fhw%3D","user_id":"1786040975106180","user_name":"三角搂子穿外面"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1786040975106180","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7590182452971179032","book_info":{"abstract":"【非重生+系统逆袭+多女主】
2004年，艺考失败，不服输的苏言来到横店成为一名群演，妄想从群演慢慢成长为巨星。
理想很丰满，现实很骨感。
日复一日的扮演尸体、炮灰，让他感觉整个人生都在沉沦。
直到进入《神雕侠侣》剧组那天，眼前突然弹出一个画面：
【绑定女神：天仙】
【付出必有回报系统启动】
从此，他的娱乐圈生存法则彻底改变：
送一瓶水，现金到账，体能增强；
解一次围，技能到手，属性暴涨。
救于危难，获得未来爆款歌曲、剧本。
……多年后，已经成为娱乐圈巨头·全能才子·多位女明星意难平的苏言回首往事，面对采访只能无奈一笑：
“我说一开始真的只想进步，你们信吗？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0003004d8353002074c2e1125a3c0e67","author":"青葱咸鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7590182452971179032","book_name":"华娱：从绑定天仙开始全能","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"17.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":43,"name":"娱乐圈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=43&name=娱乐圈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7590182579106497048","read_count":"170217","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"576983"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"216","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,娱乐圈,多女主,全能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oefa98c890649ca6cc96ae96922f782f0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779433806&x-signature=%2F5Tsxjov%2F1Wpn53%2BTJ2zhl4kQuY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3525467053238745","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"157"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323151006F8E5511696B49C22B3E7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0," 作者！我要看血流成河！我要看天仙亲自下场的撕的血流成河！ 2004年，艺考失败，不服输的苏言来到横店成为一名群演，妄想从群演慢慢成长为巨星。
理想很丰满，现实很骨感。
日复一日的扮演尸体、炮灰，让他感觉整个人生都在沉沦。
直到进入《神雕侠侣》剧组那天，眼前突然弹出一个画面：
【绑定女神：天仙】
【付出必有回报系统启动】
从此，他的娱乐圈生存法则彻底改变：
送一瓶水，现金到账，体能增强；
解一次围，技能到手，属性暴涨。
救于危难，获得未来爆款歌曲、剧本。
……多年后，已经成为娱乐圈巨头·全能才子·多位女明星意难平的苏言回首往事，面对采访只能无奈一笑：

        当然，整体来说，这已经算是华娱文水平较不错的作品了，值得一看，尤其是前期所谓“追光”阶段的情感拉扯，能看出来作者还是用了心的，考虑到在现在太监/和尚/单女主文大行其道，部分作者自缚双手情感部分甚至都不敢细写的情况下，再加两星","text_exts":[{"e":36,"s":33,"text":"拍电影","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%8B%8D%E7%94%B5%E5%BD%B1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742498069C22B3E7%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227611956071435518744%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227590182452971179032%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%8B%8D%E7%94%B5%E5%BD%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772298840,"group_id":"7590182452971179032","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwxn2gV6fsNj5erO6nkIL9s=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"385264947567658","user_name":"通体漆黑的沈万山"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"385264947567658","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7590182452971179032","book_info":{"abstract":"【非重生+系统逆袭+多女主】
